top_signals.title: BlackRock files to list its bitcoin income ETF, with expected debut next week
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: China Credit Growth Tops Forecasts in Rebound From Lending Slump
top_signals.summary: China’s credit expansion held up better than expected in May, rebounding after a rare contraction in loans the previous month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK defense secretary resigns in protest of government spending plan
top_signals.summary: In his resignation letter to Starmer, Healey said he had now seen the defense funding plan, and it “falls well short of what is required."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Prepares for Debut as $75 Billion IPO Breaks Record
top_signals.summary: SpaceX made history with a $75 billion IPO that instantly turned it into one of the biggest public companies in the world. Now it has to win over the market.

top_signals.title: TV Tairiku Ondo channels the chaotic creativity of youth
top_signals.summary: After going viral with a 90-second track in 2024, the rock quartet from Hokkaido has been hitting stages big and small and working hard on a debut album.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
